title: hedyotis nigricans var. parviflora
intro: Hedyotis nigricans var. parviflora, also known as Asian logyard or small-flowered hedyotis, is a plant species native to China. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The plant is valued for its ability to promote respiratory health, alleviate symptoms of fever, and support the immune system. Hedyotis nigricans var. parviflora is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be found in some traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
